# all-features section.
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND — commit regenerated changes together with the code.

pub fn zenresize::Hlg::to_linear(&self, f32) -> f32
pub fn zenresize::Hlg::u16_to_linear_f32(&self, &[u16], &mut [f32], &(), usize, bool, bool)
pub fn zenresize::Hlg::u8_to_linear_f32(&self, &[u8], &mut [f32], &(), usize, bool, bool)
pub fn zenresize::Hlg::u8_to_linear_i12(&self, &[u8], &mut [i16], &())
impl core::marker::Freeze for zenresize::Hlg
impl core::marker::Send for zenresize::Hlg
impl core::marker::Sync for zenresize::Hlg
impl core::marker::Unpin for zenresize::Hlg
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for zenresize::Hlg
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for zenresize::Hlg
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for zenresize::Hlg

#[non_exhaustive] pub struct zenresize::ResizeConfig
pub zenresize::ResizeConfig::filter: crate::filter::Filter
pub zenresize::ResizeConfig::in_height: u32
pub zenresize::ResizeConfig::in_stride: usize
pub zenresize::ResizeConfig::in_width: u32
pub zenresize::ResizeConfig::input: zenpixels::descriptor::PixelDescriptor
pub zenresize::ResizeConfig::kernel_width_scale: core::option::Option<f64>
pub zenresize::ResizeConfig::linear: bool
pub zenresize::ResizeConfig::lobe_ratio: zenresize::LobeRatio
pub zenresize::ResizeConfig::out_height: u32
pub zenresize::ResizeConfig::out_stride: usize
pub zenresize::ResizeConfig::out_width: u32
pub zenresize::ResizeConfig::output: zenpixels::descriptor::PixelDescriptor
pub zenresize::ResizeConfig::padding: core::option::Option<zenresize::Padding>
pub zenresize::ResizeConfig::post_blur_sigma: f32
pub zenresize::ResizeConfig::post_sharpen: f32
pub zenresize::ResizeConfig::source_region: core::option::Option<zenresize::SourceRegion>
pub zenresize::ResizeConfig::up_filter: core::option::Option<crate::filter::Filter>
impl zenresize::ResizeConfig
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfig::builder(u32, u32, u32, u32) -> zenresize::ResizeConfigBuilder
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfig::channels(&self) -> usize
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfig::effective_in_stride(&self) -> usize
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfig::effective_input_transfer(&self) -> zenpixels::descriptor::TransferFunction
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfig::effective_out_stride(&self) -> usize
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfig::effective_output_transfer(&self) -> zenpixels::descriptor::TransferFunction
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfig::input_channel_type(&self) -> zenpixels::descriptor::ChannelType
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfig::input_row_len(&self) -> usize
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfig::needs_linearization(&self) -> bool
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfig::needs_premultiply(&self) -> bool
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfig::output_channel_type(&self) -> zenpixels::descriptor::ChannelType
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfig::output_row_len(&self) -> usize
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfig::resize_in_height(&self) -> u32
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfig::resize_in_width(&self) -> u32
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfig::total_output_height(&self) -> u32
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfig::total_output_row_len(&self) -> usize
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfig::total_output_width(&self) -> u32
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfig::validate(&self) -> core::result::Result<(), &'static str>
impl core::clone::Clone for zenresize::ResizeConfig
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfig::clone(&self) -> zenresize::ResizeConfig
impl core::fmt::Debug for zenresize::ResizeConfig
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfig::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::marker::Freeze for zenresize::ResizeConfig
impl core::marker::Send for zenresize::ResizeConfig
impl core::marker::Sync for zenresize::ResizeConfig
impl core::marker::Unpin for zenresize::ResizeConfig
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for zenresize::ResizeConfig
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for zenresize::ResizeConfig
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for zenresize::ResizeConfig
pub struct zenresize::ResizeConfigBuilder

pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfigBuilder::crop(self, u32, u32, u32, u32) -> Self
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfigBuilder::filter(self, crate::filter::Filter) -> Self

pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfigBuilder::format(self, zenpixels::descriptor::PixelDescriptor) -> Self

pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfigBuilder::input(self, zenpixels::descriptor::PixelDescriptor) -> Self

pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfigBuilder::lobe_ratio(self, zenresize::LobeRatio) -> Self
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfigBuilder::out_stride(self, usize) -> Self
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfigBuilder::output(self, zenpixels::descriptor::PixelDescriptor) -> Self

pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfigBuilder::up_filter(self, crate::filter::Filter) -> Self
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfigBuilder::with_padding(self, zenresize::Padding) -> Self

impl core::marker::Send for zenresize::ResizeConfigBuilder
impl core::marker::Sync for zenresize::ResizeConfigBuilder

pub struct zenresize::Resizer<B: zenresize::composite::Background>
impl zenresize::Resizer<zenresize::composite::NoBackground>
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<zenresize::composite::NoBackground>::new(&zenresize::ResizeConfig) -> Self
impl<B: zenresize::composite::Background> zenresize::Resizer<B>
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::background_mut(&mut self) -> &mut B
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::into_background(self) -> B
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::resize(&mut self, &[u8]) -> alloc::vec::Vec<u8>
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::resize_f32(&mut self, &[f32]) -> alloc::vec::Vec<f32>
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::resize_f32_into(&mut self, &[f32], &mut [f32])
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::resize_f32_to_u16(&mut self, &[f32]) -> alloc::vec::Vec<u16>
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::resize_f32_to_u16_into(&mut self, &[f32], &mut [u16])
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::resize_f32_to_u8(&mut self, &[f32]) -> alloc::vec::Vec<u8>
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::resize_f32_to_u8_into(&mut self, &[f32], &mut [u8])
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::resize_into(&mut self, &[u8], &mut [u8])
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::resize_u16(&mut self, &[u16]) -> alloc::vec::Vec<u16>
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::resize_u16_into(&mut self, &[u16], &mut [u16])
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::resize_u16_to_f32(&mut self, &[u16]) -> alloc::vec::Vec<f32>
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::resize_u16_to_f32_into(&mut self, &[u16], &mut [f32])
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::resize_u16_to_u8(&mut self, &[u16]) -> alloc::vec::Vec<u8>
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::resize_u16_to_u8_into(&mut self, &[u16], &mut [u8])
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::resize_u8_to_f32(&mut self, &[u8]) -> alloc::vec::Vec<f32>
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::resize_u8_to_f32_into(&mut self, &[u8], &mut [f32])
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::resize_u8_to_u16(&mut self, &[u8]) -> alloc::vec::Vec<u16>
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::resize_u8_to_u16_into(&mut self, &[u8], &mut [u16])
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::with_background(&zenresize::ResizeConfig, B) -> core::result::Result<Self, whereat::at::At<zenresize::composite::CompositeError>>
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::with_blend_mode(self, zenblend::BlendMode) -> Self
impl<B> core::marker::Freeze for zenresize::Resizer<B> where B: core::marker::Freeze
impl<B> core::marker::Send for zenresize::Resizer<B> where B: core::marker::Send
impl<B> !core::marker::Sync for zenresize::Resizer<B>

pub struct zenresize::StreamedBackground

impl zenresize::composite::Background for zenresize::composite::StreamedBackground
pub fn zenresize::composite::StreamedBackground::fill_row(&mut self, &mut [f32], u32, u8)
pub fn zenresize::composite::StreamedBackground::is_opaque(&self) -> bool
pub fn zenresize::composite::StreamedBackground::is_transparent(&self) -> bool

impl core::marker::Freeze for zenresize::composite::StreamedBackground
impl core::marker::Send for zenresize::composite::StreamedBackground
impl core::marker::Sync for zenresize::composite::StreamedBackground
impl core::marker::Unpin for zenresize::composite::StreamedBackground
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for zenresize::composite::StreamedBackground
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for zenresize::composite::StreamedBackground
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for zenresize::composite::StreamedBackground
pub struct zenresize::StreamingResize<B: zenresize::composite::Background>
impl zenresize::StreamingResize<zenresize::composite::NoBackground>
pub fn zenresize::StreamingResize<zenresize::composite::NoBackground>::new(&zenresize::ResizeConfig) -> Self
pub fn zenresize::StreamingResize<zenresize::composite::NoBackground>::with_batch_hint(&zenresize::ResizeConfig, u32) -> Self
impl<B: zenresize::composite::Background> zenresize::StreamingResize<B>
pub fn zenresize::StreamingResize<B>::background_mut(&mut self) -> &mut B
pub fn zenresize::StreamingResize<B>::finish(&mut self) -> u32
pub fn zenresize::StreamingResize<B>::initial_input_rows_needed(&self) -> u32
pub fn zenresize::StreamingResize<B>::input_row_len(&self) -> usize
pub fn zenresize::StreamingResize<B>::into_background(self) -> B
pub fn zenresize::StreamingResize<B>::is_complete(&self) -> bool
pub fn zenresize::StreamingResize<B>::next_output_row(&mut self) -> core::option::Option<&[u8]>
pub fn zenresize::StreamingResize<B>::next_output_row_f32(&mut self) -> core::option::Option<&[f32]>
pub fn zenresize::StreamingResize<B>::next_output_row_into(&mut self, &mut [u8]) -> bool
pub fn zenresize::StreamingResize<B>::next_output_row_over(&mut self, &[f32]) -> core::option::Option<&[u8]>

pub fn zenresize::StreamingResize<B>::output_rows_produced(&self) -> u32

pub trait zenresize::TransferCurve: core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync + 'static
pub type zenresize::TransferCurve::Luts: core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync
pub fn zenresize::TransferCurve::build_luts(&self) -> Self::Luts
pub fn zenresize::TransferCurve::f32_to_linear_inplace(&self, &mut [f32], usize, bool, bool)
pub fn zenresize::TransferCurve::from_linear(&self, f32) -> f32
pub fn zenresize::TransferCurve::is_identity(&self) -> bool
pub fn zenresize::TransferCurve::linear_f32_to_u16(&self, &[f32], &mut [u16], &Self::Luts, usize, bool, bool)
pub fn zenresize::TransferCurve::linear_f32_to_u8(&self, &[f32], &mut [u8], &Self::Luts, usize, bool, bool)

pub fn zenresize::TransferCurve::linear_to_f32_inplace(&self, &mut [f32], usize, bool, bool)
pub fn zenresize::TransferCurve::to_linear(&self, f32) -> f32
pub fn zenresize::TransferCurve::u16_to_linear_f32(&self, &[u16], &mut [f32], &Self::Luts, usize, bool, bool)
pub fn zenresize::TransferCurve::u8_to_linear_f32(&self, &[u8], &mut [f32], &Self::Luts, usize, bool, bool)
pub fn zenresize::TransferCurve::u8_to_linear_i12(&self, &[u8], &mut [i16], &Self::Luts)

pub trait zenresize::composite::Background
pub fn zenresize::composite::Background::fill_row(&mut self, &mut [f32], u32, u8)
pub fn zenresize::composite::Background::is_opaque(&self) -> bool
pub fn zenresize::composite::Background::is_transparent(&self) -> bool
pub fn zenresize::composite::Background::solid_pixel(&self) -> core::option::Option<&[f32; 4]>
impl zenresize::composite::Background for zenresize::composite::NoBackground
pub fn zenresize::composite::NoBackground::fill_row(&mut self, &mut [f32], u32, u8)
pub fn zenresize::composite::NoBackground::is_opaque(&self) -> bool
pub fn zenresize::composite::NoBackground::is_transparent(&self) -> bool
pub fn zenresize::composite::NoBackground::solid_pixel(&self) -> core::option::Option<&[f32; 4]>
impl zenresize::composite::Background for zenresize::composite::SliceBackground<'_>

pub fn zenresize::composite::SliceBackground<'_>::is_opaque(&self) -> bool
pub fn zenresize::composite::SliceBackground<'_>::is_transparent(&self) -> bool
pub fn zenresize::composite::SliceBackground<'_>::solid_pixel(&self) -> core::option::Option<&[f32; 4]>
impl zenresize::composite::Background for zenresize::composite::SolidBackground
pub fn zenresize::composite::SolidBackground::fill_row(&mut self, &mut [f32], u32, u8)
pub fn zenresize::composite::SolidBackground::is_opaque(&self) -> bool
pub fn zenresize::composite::SolidBackground::is_transparent(&self) -> bool
pub fn zenresize::composite::SolidBackground::solid_pixel(&self) -> core::option::Option<&[f32; 4]>
impl zenresize::composite::Background for zenresize::composite::StreamedBackground

pub fn zenresize::composite::StreamedBackground::is_opaque(&self) -> bool
pub fn zenresize::composite::StreamedBackground::is_transparent(&self) -> bool
pub fn zenresize::composite::StreamedBackground::solid_pixel(&self) -> core::option::Option<&[f32; 4]>

pub fn zenresize::composite::unpremultiply_f32_row(&mut [f32])

pub fn zenresize::Pq::linear_to_f32_inplace(&self, &mut [f32], usize, bool, bool)
pub fn zenresize::Pq::to_linear(&self, f32) -> f32
pub fn zenresize::Pq::u16_to_linear_f32(&self, &[u16], &mut [f32], &(), usize, bool, bool)
pub fn zenresize::Pq::u8_to_linear_f32(&self, &[u8], &mut [f32], &(), usize, bool, bool)
pub fn zenresize::Pq::u8_to_linear_i12(&self, &[u8], &mut [i16], &())
impl core::marker::Freeze for zenresize::Pq
impl core::marker::Send for zenresize::Pq
impl core::marker::Sync for zenresize::Pq
impl core::marker::Unpin for zenresize::Pq
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for zenresize::Pq
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for zenresize::Pq
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for zenresize::Pq
#[non_exhaustive] pub struct zenresize::ResizeConfig
pub zenresize::ResizeConfig::filter: crate::filter::Filter
pub zenresize::ResizeConfig::in_height: u32
pub zenresize::ResizeConfig::in_stride: usize
pub zenresize::ResizeConfig::in_width: u32
pub zenresize::ResizeConfig::input: zenpixels::descriptor::PixelDescriptor
pub zenresize::ResizeConfig::kernel_width_scale: core::option::Option<f64>
pub zenresize::ResizeConfig::linear: bool
pub zenresize::ResizeConfig::lobe_ratio: zenresize::LobeRatio
pub zenresize::ResizeConfig::out_height: u32
pub zenresize::ResizeConfig::out_stride: usize
pub zenresize::ResizeConfig::out_width: u32
pub zenresize::ResizeConfig::output: zenpixels::descriptor::PixelDescriptor
pub zenresize::ResizeConfig::padding: core::option::Option<zenresize::Padding>
pub zenresize::ResizeConfig::post_blur_sigma: f32
pub zenresize::ResizeConfig::post_sharpen: f32
pub zenresize::ResizeConfig::source_region: core::option::Option<zenresize::SourceRegion>
pub zenresize::ResizeConfig::up_filter: core::option::Option<crate::filter::Filter>
impl zenresize::ResizeConfig
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfig::builder(u32, u32, u32, u32) -> zenresize::ResizeConfigBuilder
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfig::channels(&self) -> usize
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfig::effective_in_stride(&self) -> usize
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfig::effective_input_transfer(&self) -> zenpixels::descriptor::TransferFunction
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfig::effective_out_stride(&self) -> usize
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfig::effective_output_transfer(&self) -> zenpixels::descriptor::TransferFunction
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfig::input_channel_type(&self) -> zenpixels::descriptor::ChannelType
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfig::input_row_len(&self) -> usize
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfig::needs_linearization(&self) -> bool
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfig::needs_premultiply(&self) -> bool
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfig::output_channel_type(&self) -> zenpixels::descriptor::ChannelType
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfig::output_row_len(&self) -> usize
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfig::resize_in_height(&self) -> u32
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfig::resize_in_width(&self) -> u32
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfig::total_output_height(&self) -> u32
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfig::total_output_row_len(&self) -> usize
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfig::total_output_width(&self) -> u32
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfig::validate(&self) -> core::result::Result<(), &'static str>
impl core::clone::Clone for zenresize::ResizeConfig
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfig::clone(&self) -> zenresize::ResizeConfig
impl core::fmt::Debug for zenresize::ResizeConfig
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfig::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::marker::Freeze for zenresize::ResizeConfig
impl core::marker::Send for zenresize::ResizeConfig
impl core::marker::Sync for zenresize::ResizeConfig
impl core::marker::Unpin for zenresize::ResizeConfig
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for zenresize::ResizeConfig
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for zenresize::ResizeConfig
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for zenresize::ResizeConfig
pub struct zenresize::ResizeConfigBuilder
impl zenresize::ResizeConfigBuilder
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfigBuilder::build(self) -> zenresize::ResizeConfig
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfigBuilder::crop(self, u32, u32, u32, u32) -> Self
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfigBuilder::filter(self, crate::filter::Filter) -> Self
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfigBuilder::fit(self, zenresize::fit::FitMode, u32, u32) -> Self
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfigBuilder::format(self, zenpixels::descriptor::PixelDescriptor) -> Self
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfigBuilder::in_stride(self, usize) -> Self
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfigBuilder::input(self, zenpixels::descriptor::PixelDescriptor) -> Self
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfigBuilder::kernel_width_scale(self, f64) -> Self
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfigBuilder::linear(self) -> Self
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfigBuilder::lobe_ratio(self, zenresize::LobeRatio) -> Self
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfigBuilder::out_stride(self, usize) -> Self
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfigBuilder::output(self, zenpixels::descriptor::PixelDescriptor) -> Self
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfigBuilder::padding(self, u32, u32, u32, u32) -> Self
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfigBuilder::padding_color(self, [f32; 4]) -> Self
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfigBuilder::padding_uniform(self, u32) -> Self
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfigBuilder::post_blur(self, f32) -> Self
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfigBuilder::post_sharpen(self, f32) -> Self
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfigBuilder::resize_sharpen(self, f32) -> Self
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfigBuilder::source_region(self, zenresize::SourceRegion) -> Self
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfigBuilder::srgb(self) -> Self
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfigBuilder::up_filter(self, crate::filter::Filter) -> Self
pub fn zenresize::ResizeConfigBuilder::with_padding(self, zenresize::Padding) -> Self

impl core::marker::Send for zenresize::ResizeConfigBuilder
impl core::marker::Sync for zenresize::ResizeConfigBuilder

pub struct zenresize::Resizer<B: zenresize::composite::Background>
impl zenresize::Resizer<zenresize::composite::NoBackground>
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<zenresize::composite::NoBackground>::new(&zenresize::ResizeConfig) -> Self
impl<B: zenresize::composite::Background> zenresize::Resizer<B>
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::background_mut(&mut self) -> &mut B
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::into_background(self) -> B
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::resize(&mut self, &[u8]) -> alloc::vec::Vec<u8>
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::resize_f32(&mut self, &[f32]) -> alloc::vec::Vec<f32>
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::resize_f32_into(&mut self, &[f32], &mut [f32])
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::resize_f32_to_u16(&mut self, &[f32]) -> alloc::vec::Vec<u16>
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::resize_f32_to_u16_into(&mut self, &[f32], &mut [u16])
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::resize_f32_to_u8(&mut self, &[f32]) -> alloc::vec::Vec<u8>
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::resize_f32_to_u8_into(&mut self, &[f32], &mut [u8])
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::resize_into(&mut self, &[u8], &mut [u8])
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::resize_u16(&mut self, &[u16]) -> alloc::vec::Vec<u16>
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::resize_u16_into(&mut self, &[u16], &mut [u16])
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::resize_u16_to_f32(&mut self, &[u16]) -> alloc::vec::Vec<f32>
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::resize_u16_to_f32_into(&mut self, &[u16], &mut [f32])
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::resize_u16_to_u8(&mut self, &[u16]) -> alloc::vec::Vec<u8>
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::resize_u16_to_u8_into(&mut self, &[u16], &mut [u8])
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::resize_u8_to_f32(&mut self, &[u8]) -> alloc::vec::Vec<f32>
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::resize_u8_to_f32_into(&mut self, &[u8], &mut [f32])
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::resize_u8_to_u16(&mut self, &[u8]) -> alloc::vec::Vec<u16>
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::resize_u8_to_u16_into(&mut self, &[u8], &mut [u16])
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::with_background(&zenresize::ResizeConfig, B) -> core::result::Result<Self, whereat::at::At<zenresize::composite::CompositeError>>
pub fn zenresize::Resizer<B>::with_blend_mode(self, zenblend::BlendMode) -> Self

impl<B: zenresize::composite::Background> zenresize::StreamingResize<B>
pub fn zenresize::StreamingResize<B>::background_mut(&mut self) -> &mut B
pub fn zenresize::StreamingResize<B>::finish(&mut self) -> u32
pub fn zenresize::StreamingResize<B>::initial_input_rows_needed(&self) -> u32
pub fn zenresize::StreamingResize<B>::input_row_len(&self) -> usize
pub fn zenresize::StreamingResize<B>::into_background(self) -> B
pub fn zenresize::StreamingResize<B>::is_complete(&self) -> bool
pub fn zenresize::StreamingResize<B>::next_output_row(&mut self) -> core::option::Option<&[u8]>
pub fn zenresize::StreamingResize<B>::next_output_row_f32(&mut self) -> core::option::Option<&[f32]>
pub fn zenresize::StreamingResize<B>::next_output_row_into(&mut self, &mut [u8]) -> bool
pub fn zenresize::StreamingResize<B>::next_output_row_over(&mut self, &[f32]) -> core::option::Option<&[u8]>
pub fn zenresize::StreamingResize<B>::next_output_row_premul_linear_f32(&mut self) -> core::option::Option<&[f32]>
pub fn zenresize::StreamingResize<B>::next_output_row_u16(&mut self) -> core::option::Option<&[u16]>
pub fn zenresize::StreamingResize<B>::next_output_row_u16_into(&mut self, &mut [u16]) -> bool
pub fn zenresize::StreamingResize<B>::orientation(&self) -> zenresize::OrientOutput
pub fn zenresize::StreamingResize<B>::output_row_len(&self) -> usize
pub fn zenresize::StreamingResize<B>::output_rows_available(&self) -> u32
pub fn zenresize::StreamingResize<B>::output_rows_produced(&self) -> u32
pub fn zenresize::StreamingResize<B>::push_row(&mut self, &[u8]) -> core::result::Result<(), whereat::at::At<zenresize::StreamingError>>

pub fn zenresize::StreamingResize<B>::push_rows(&mut self, &[u8], usize, u32) -> core::result::Result<u32, whereat::at::At<zenresize::StreamingError>>
pub fn zenresize::StreamingResize<B>::reset(&mut self)
pub fn zenresize::StreamingResize<B>::total_output_height(&self) -> u32
pub fn zenresize::StreamingResize<B>::total_rows_emitted(&self) -> u32
pub fn zenresize::StreamingResize<B>::with_background(&zenresize::ResizeConfig, B) -> core::result::Result<Self, whereat::at::At<zenresize::composite::CompositeError>>
pub fn zenresize::StreamingResize<B>::with_blend_mode(self, zenblend::BlendMode) -> Self
pub fn zenresize::StreamingResize<B>::with_mask(self, impl zenblend::mask::MaskSource + core::marker::Send + 'static) -> Self
pub fn zenresize::StreamingResize<B>::with_orientation(self, zenresize::OrientOutput) -> Self
pub fn zenresize::StreamingResize<B>::working_format(&self) -> zenresize::WorkingFormat
impl<B> core::marker::Freeze for zenresize::StreamingResize<B> where B: core::marker::Freeze
impl<B> core::marker::Send for zenresize::StreamingResize<B> where B: core::marker::Send
impl<B> !core::marker::Sync for zenresize::StreamingResize<B>
impl<B> core::marker::Unpin for zenresize::StreamingResize<B> where B: core::marker::Unpin
impl<B> core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for zenresize::StreamingResize<B> where B: core::marker::UnsafeUnpin
impl<B> !core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for zenresize::StreamingResize<B>
impl<B> !core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for zenresize::StreamingResize<B>
pub trait zenresize::Background
pub fn zenresize::Background::fill_row(&mut self, &mut [f32], u32, u8)
pub fn zenresize::Background::is_opaque(&self) -> bool
pub fn zenresize::Background::is_transparent(&self) -> bool
pub fn zenresize::Background::solid_pixel(&self) -> core::option::Option<&[f32; 4]>
impl zenresize::composite::Background for zenresize::composite::NoBackground
pub fn zenresize::composite::NoBackground::fill_row(&mut self, &mut [f32], u32, u8)
pub fn zenresize::composite::NoBackground::is_opaque(&self) -> bool
pub fn zenresize::composite::NoBackground::is_transparent(&self) -> bool
pub fn zenresize::composite::NoBackground::solid_pixel(&self) -> core::option::Option<&[f32; 4]>
impl zenresize::composite::Background for zenresize::composite::SliceBackground<'_>
pub fn zenresize::composite::SliceBackground<'_>::fill_row(&mut self, &mut [f32], u32, u8)
pub fn zenresize::composite::SliceBackground<'_>::is_opaque(&self) -> bool
pub fn zenresize::composite::SliceBackground<'_>::is_transparent(&self) -> bool
pub fn zenresize::composite::SliceBackground<'_>::solid_pixel(&self) -> core::option::Option<&[f32; 4]>
impl zenresize::composite::Background for zenresize::composite::SolidBackground
pub fn zenresize::composite::SolidBackground::fill_row(&mut self, &mut [f32], u32, u8)
pub fn zenresize::composite::SolidBackground::is_opaque(&self) -> bool
pub fn zenresize::composite::SolidBackground::is_transparent(&self) -> bool
pub fn zenresize::composite::SolidBackground::solid_pixel(&self) -> core::option::Option<&[f32; 4]>
impl zenresize::composite::Background for zenresize::composite::StreamedBackground

pub fn zenresize::composite::StreamedBackground::is_opaque(&self) -> bool
pub fn zenresize::composite::StreamedBackground::is_transparent(&self) -> bool
pub fn zenresize::composite::StreamedBackground::solid_pixel(&self) -> core::option::Option<&[f32; 4]>
pub trait zenresize::Element: core::marker::Copy + core::default::Default + core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync + 'static
pub fn zenresize::Element::alloc_output(usize) -> alloc::vec::Vec<Self>
impl zenresize::Element for f32
pub fn f32::alloc_output(usize) -> alloc::vec::Vec<Self>
impl zenresize::Element for u16
pub fn u16::alloc_output(usize) -> alloc::vec::Vec<Self>
impl zenresize::Element for u8
pub fn u8::alloc_output(usize) -> alloc::vec::Vec<Self>
pub trait zenresize::TransferCurve: core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync + 'static
pub type zenresize::TransferCurve::Luts: core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync
pub fn zenresize::TransferCurve::build_luts(&self) -> Self::Luts
pub fn zenresize::TransferCurve::f32_to_linear_inplace(&self, &mut [f32], usize, bool, bool)
pub fn zenresize::TransferCurve::from_linear(&self, f32) -> f32
pub fn zenresize::TransferCurve::is_identity(&self) -> bool
pub fn zenresize::TransferCurve::linear_f32_to_u16(&self, &[f32], &mut [u16], &Self::Luts, usize, bool, bool)
pub fn zenresize::TransferCurve::linear_f32_to_u8(&self, &[f32], &mut [u8], &Self::Luts, usize, bool, bool)
pub fn zenresize::TransferCurve::linear_i12_to_u8(&self, &[i16], &mut [u8], &Self::Luts)
pub fn zenresize::TransferCurve::linear_to_f32_inplace(&self, &mut [f32], usize, bool, bool)
pub fn zenresize::TransferCurve::to_linear(&self, f32) -> f32
pub fn zenresize::TransferCurve::u16_to_linear_f32(&self, &[u16], &mut [f32], &Self::Luts, usize, bool, bool)
pub fn zenresize::TransferCurve::u8_to_linear_f32(&self, &[u8], &mut [f32], &Self::Luts, usize, bool, bool)
pub fn zenresize::TransferCurve::u8_to_linear_i12(&self, &[u8], &mut [i16], &Self::Luts)
impl zenresize::TransferCurve for zenresize::Bt709
pub type zenresize::Bt709::Luts = ()
pub fn zenresize::Bt709::build_luts(&self) -> Self::Luts
